<!--
Thanks for contributing! Please keep PRs focused on one logical change.
See CONTRIBUTING.md for the full guide.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat`)
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup (`refactor` / `chore`)
- [ ] Docs (`docs`)
- [ ] CI / build (`ci` / `build`)

## Checklist

- [ ] `make check` passes locally (fmt, vet, lint, race tests + coverage gate).
- [ ] Added or updated tests for the change.
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `## [Unreleased]` (if user-visible).
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org).
- [ ] Touched OS-specific code? Verified the cross-compile matrix builds.

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything reviewers should focus on, trade-offs, follow-ups, etc. -->
